# CrimeGPT Demo Checklist (Day 1)

## A. FIR to Arrest Flow
- [ ] Create FIR via FIR Automator with complainant, accused, incident narrative.
- [ ] Confirm FIR appears in dashboard activity feed.
- [ ] Add at least 2 case diary timeline entries (investigation + arrest).
- [ ] Upload one evidence item in Vault.

## B. Minimum 4 Auto-Generated Documents (PS Deliverable)
- [ ] Chargesheet generated and reviewed.
- [ ] Medical Treatment Letter generated.
- [ ] Remand Request Letter generated.
- [ ] Seizure Receipt generated.

## C. Legal Intelligence Demo
- [ ] Run one LexBot legal query from incident narrative.
- [ ] Show suggested legal sections.
- [ ] Show response grounded in corpus references.

## D. Multilingual Capability
- [ ] Use `/nlp/translate` for en→hi example.
- [ ] Use `/nlp/translate` for en→gu example.

## E. Audit / Traceability
- [ ] Verify action logs for authentication and document generation events.

## F. Demo Evidence Pack
Store screenshots and exports under:
- `docs/samples/`
- Include timestamps and feature name in filenames.
